Publications[10]

Selected first-author work. Full list available on Google Scholar.

  • How Long Can Unified Multimodal Models Generate Images Reliably? Taming Long-Horizon Interleaved Image Generation via Context Curation [Generative Models] PDF arXiv 2026
  • POSTA: A Go-to Framework for Customized Artistic Poster Generation [Generative Models] Homepage PDF CVPR 2025
  • JarvisIR: Elevating Autonomous Driving Perception with Intelligent Image Restoration [Multi-Modal Agent] Homepage PDF CVPR 2025
  • PhotoArtAgent: Intelligent Photo Retouching with Artist Agents [Multi-Modal Agent] PDF CVPR 2026 Findings
  • RestoreAgent: Autonomous Image Restoration Agent via Multimodal LLMs [Multi-Modal Agent] Homepage PDF NeurIPS 2024
  • Low-Res Leads the Way: Improving Generalization for Super-Resolution [Low-level Vision] Homepage PDF CVPR 2024
  • Masked Image Training for Generalizable Deep Image Denoising [Low-level Vision] Code PDF CVPR 2023
  • Snow Removal in Video: A New Dataset and A Novel Method [Adverse Weather] Homepage PDF ICCV 2023
  • Density-Aware Video Desnowing with Robust Alignment on a Large-Scale Dataset [Adverse Weather] TMM 2026
  • Attention in Attention Network for Image Super-Resolution [Low-level Vision] Code PDF arXiv 2021
